headline: Angi, Robinhood, and Sea Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the morning session after the strong payroll print (172,000, more than double the 80,000 consensus) confirmed the higher-for-longer narrative and sent the 10-year yield above 4.5%, compressing valuations across high-multiple digital platforms.
